descriptionHtml:
Bali 4.3 for sale 2018 | 4 Cabins Version + 1 Crew Cabin | Tax Not Paid

If you’re in the market for a seaworthy catamaran, the Bali 4.3 for sale 2018 offers a remarkable opportunity. This model, built by the renowned CATANA GROUP and designed by Xavier Fay and Olivier Poncin, combines comfort and performance in an impressive package. The vessel is currently located in Campania and is in good condition, making it a viable choice for those looking to explore the waters.

Specifications of the Bali 4.3 for sale 2018:

  • Year of Construction: 2018
  • Length Overall: 13.10 m
  • Beam: 7.12 m
  • Draft: 1.2 m
  • Displacement: 11,300 kg
  • Flag: Italian
  • Number of Owners: 1
  • Registration: Registered vessel
  • Safety Certificate Valid Until: 2028
  • Capacity: 12 persons
  • CE Marking: A

Deck and Hull

  • Hull Colour: White
  • Hull Material: Fibreglass (VTR)
  • Chairs/Loungers: Yes (bow sunbed, fly sunbed, seating, stern bench)
  • Keel Material: Fibreglass (VTR)
  • Keel Shape: Skeg
  • Bimini: Yes
  • Cockpit Table: Yes (double at the bow)
  • Notes: Hatch at the stern, retractable window at the bow

Interior

  • Number of Double Cabins: 4
  • Number of Crew Cabins: 1
  • Convertible Dinette Beds: 2
  • Number of Bathrooms: 4 (with electric toilets)
  • Stove: Yes
  • Oven: Yes
  • Refrigerator: Yes (American-style, 615 litres, 220V)
  • Notes: Bathroom for skipper’s cabin

Engine and Propulsion

  • Number of Engines: 2
  • Engine Type: Inboard diesel
  • Engine Brand: Yanmar
  • Engine Power: 57 hp each
  • Year of Engine Manufacture: 2018
  • Fuel Tank Capacity: 800 litres
  • Transmission Type: S-drive
  • Propeller Type: Fixed 3 blades
  • Steering: Wheel steering
  • Notes: Steering command on fly

Equipment and Electronics

  • Autopilot: Yes
  • VHF Radio: Yes (internal + external)
  • Echo Sounder: Yes
  • Log: Yes
  • TriData: Yes
  • Compass: Yes
  • Stereo System: Yes
  • Plotter: Yes (12" on fly, 7" interior)
  • Wind Instruments: Yes
  • Electrical System: 12/220V
  • Batteries: 6 (600 amp total)
  • Water Tanks: 2 (800 litres total capacity)
  • Water Tank Material: Plastic
  • Bilge Pumps: 2 automatic + 2 manual
  • Heating System: Yes (air conditioning with inverter)
  • Charger: Yes
  • Air Conditioning: Yes (cabins + dinette Frigomar)
  • Water Heater: Yes
  • Pressure Pump: Yes
  • Black Water System: Yes
  • External Shower: Yes
  • Notes: 6 kW generator, 12V desalination plant (200 litres/hour)

Rigging and Safety

  • Mast Type: Supported mast
  • Winches: 2 (1 electric)
  • Winch Brand: Harken
  • Lazy Bag: Yes
  • Sails: Self-tacking jib, full-batten mainsail
  • Anchor Winch: Yes
  • Anchor: Yes
  • Chain: Yes
  • Mooring Lines: Yes
  • Life Raft: Yes
  • Fenders: 6

This Bali 4.3 for sale 2018 not only promises a robust performance but is also comfortable for significant passages or leisurely days on the water with friends and family. If you're interested in a reliable catamaran that has been well-maintained, this could be the right pick for you.
